wikitext.*:
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Norman uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. Norman will always lead with his signature Pokémon, {{p|Slaking}}.
